title: Pan-Seared Trout with Lemon and Herbs
description: A simple and flavorful dish that brings out the best in trout. Paired with a side of toastie for a satisfying meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the trout fillets with salt and pepper.
3. Add olive oil to the skillet and sear the trout for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the trout from the skillet and set aside.
5. Add the lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Add the chopped parsley and dill to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Serve the trout with the lemon and herb sauce spooned over the top.
8. Serve with a side of toastie for a satisfying meal.
